paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.65, with a change of 8.66% compared to the prior close and a change of -25.86% over the last 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding the second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, as well as a report on why the stock tumbled more than 28% in after-hours trading. The earnings call is scheduled to take place on August 13, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson. Additionally, there was a Form 8-K filing regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Insider activity includes one Form 4 filing.
